summary:
UPCOMING TULSA REVIVAL: Brandon details a forthcoming major spiritual revival and outpouring of the Holy Spirit centered at the Oral Roberts University campus, the Mabee Center, and Victory Church in Tulsa. Brandon states that this movement will surpass the Asbury revival, featuring visible signs and wonders, including a pillar of Glory over the campus reminiscent of the Azusa Street revival. The event will involve uncapping old spiritual wells and will serve as a final call for a massive harvest of souls before the end times.

DIVINE URGENCY AND GLOBAL SHAKING: Brandon conveys a message he states was given to him by God, indicating a severe lack of urgency within the current church body and its leadership regarding the return of Jesus Christ. To rectify this, Brandon notes that a profound global shaking is imminent, characterized by earthquakes, volcanoes, and celestial signs. This shaking is designed to awaken individuals from their spiritual slumber, removing those who stand in the way while elevating a new, hungry remnant to execute God's final push for salvation.

DENOMINATIONAL UNITY AND ANGELIC ASSISTANCE: Brandon explains that the impending spiritual movement will break down traditional denominational barriers separating Baptists, Catholics, Methodists, and others. The body of believers will unite with a singular focus on reaching the lost, operating collectively like citizens during a wartime effort. Additionally, Brandon shares that God is deploying His angel army reserves, assigning two angels per person to assist believers in overcoming demonic forces and performing supernatural feats.

NINETEEN EIGHTY THREE KENNETH E HAGIN PROPHECY: Brandon recounts a prophetic word delivered by Kenneth E. Hagin in 1983, which predicts an unprecedented revival of divine healing and supernatural manifestations. According to the prophecy, a new breed of humble, non-greedy ministers and laypeople will emerge. The text describes visible manifestations of God's presence, such as clouds over congregations and literal fire over buildings and people's heads. Believers will operate in the supernatural as effortlessly as breathing or flying, and the church will experience a massive influx of new converts requiring larger spiritual nets.

VISIONS OF END TIMES AND TRIBULATION: Brandon recounts personal visions regarding the end times, including Jesus standing at a door waiting for the Father's command to initiate the rapture. He also describes a vision of a black horse and a green horse riding across Africa, Europe, and the Middle East, bringing severe drought, pestilence, and plagues. Brandon attributes these impending disasters to human weather manipulation and population control efforts that will spiral out of control, leading to sudden destruction following false promises of peace and safety.

FINANCIAL WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon states that an upcoming financial outpouring for believers is intended strictly to fund the rapid harvesting of souls and the spread of the gospel, not for personal luxury or materialistic gain. He emphasizes that this wealth transfer will be short-lived, as believers will soon leave earthly possessions behind during the rapture, while those left behind will face tribulation.

COMMUNION AND SPIRITUAL WARFARE: Brandon details the literal and spiritual power of the blood of Jesus to heal all physical ailments, including cancer, diabetes, and heart disease, referencing scriptural promises of redemption from curses. He explains spiritual warfare in a courtroom context, where Satan acts as the accuser and Jesus serves as the defense attorney. Believers must actively resist the devil and plead the blood of Jesus to claim innocence and secure divine protection over their families, health, and finances.
rawData: [February 12, 2026]-[The Lord said most of the church is asleep - There’s not enough urgency - Jesus is coming]-[https://youtu.be/h_RtMs6HUVs]-[Hey, good morning family. How are y'all doing? It's evening here now, but I always say good morning because it's morning somewhere. I always come here to this campus because of what the Lord has showed me is coming here. And these praying hands when I drive by, they mean so much to me. You know, the motto of the school is 'Make no little plans here.' This is the ORU campus, by the way. I was driving by tonight and the Holy Spirit was just stirring in me so strong about the revival that's about to take place at this campus. You know, it's just what faith will build, what faith will do when you use your faith like a muscle. It's important, y'all. I drive by this because it inspires me to think big. It inspires me because this is what Oral Roberts believed God for. Every day I try to drive around here at least once and try to come over here and just inspire myself. The towers over there where the hospital was—I know they've sold that recently, I believe—but just the center, because the Lord showed me there will be a major outpouring of the spirit of the Lord in that big coliseum once again. The old wells of revival are coming uncapped. He told me, and I come over and I look at the prayer tower. Can you see the prayer tower over there? The prayer tower right there—it's right over there. That's where they pray. And I just thought, you know, it's exciting because some of the greatest ministers of any generation—I mean, I believe from Kathryn Kuhlman to Benny Hinn to all the greats that have come through here and had healing services and deliverance services where, you know, their ministry may not be all that it was back then, but look at what God did at one point in time through this right here. And what an amazing thing that he's doing and I know that he's going to do again. I showed you Victory and it's just right there. And I'm just excited because expectation brings manifestation. And it has nothing to even do with me. It's just something that I pray over because I know that God is going to visit the young generation, this young youth again with one last call, one last harvest, a major harvest of souls like we've never seen before and the glory of the Lord with fire. I believe that there'll be signs and wonders in the last days like it did with Azusa Street when there was a pillar of fire that was shown over Azusa Street. And I'm believing there'll be a pillar of fire over this Mabee Center and there'll be a pillar of fire over this ORU campus and that there will be a greater revival than even what happened at Asbury. You know that revival, I don't know, I guess it kind of fizzled out, but my goodness, I know that we're on the cusp of something huge about to take place in this Tulsa metroplex area and that God is about to do something huge in these last days. The Lord showed me Pastor Billy Joe Daugherty's son Paul Daugherty at that church right there, that there'll be an extension of the revival that's about to take place at ORU. And this is a massive church there, Victory. Well, Diana's with me now and it was so cold I had to get out of being outside. I told her, I said, 'I can't make this video.' I was trying to go and make the video at the campus and I was freezing. The wind was blowing so hard and it was cold and I told Braden, I said, 'Are you cold?' He goes, 'Yeah.' I said, 'I'm cold, too. Let's go.' So, you know, we have such an urgency though as we make the rest of this video for you all. The things the Lord has been putting on our hearts is he said, 'Brandon, people are not awake yet. There's no sense of urgency. Even in the upper leadership, they have a form of urgency, but deep down in their heart, there's not a stirring.' And people go, 'Well, you're judging people.' No, I'm not judging people. I'm just saying what he says. I have no idea what you feel, but I know what the Holy Spirit has told me, and I'm just going by what he said. So, if you don't agree with it, take it up with him. All I can say is what he's told me and what we pray about. And the Lord said, 'I'm going to bring a greater shaking to awaken beyond anybody's comprehension of what's about to happen, folks. I'm telling you, a major shaking.' And people go, 'Well, that sounds like fear.' You know, Diana and I are talking about a lot of the people that we've come in contact with. They say, 'Well, you're a fearmonger or whatever.' They've said that before to us in the past and maybe, just maybe, your channel has grown so much because you preach a lot of fear because fear sells. But folks, it's not fear. It's an awakening unto God. And if you're in fear, it's because you're not awake. Your heart should be looking vertical with him. And that shouldn't scare you whenever he said these things are going to happen because why? We're dead to self. We are looking for the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. And we have an urgency. And he told me, he said, 'Brandon, there's no urgency. There's no urgency in my body. There's no urgency right now. Do you really realize I'm on my way? Do you really realize that this is the last call for the harvest of souls, the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen before?' As we sit on ORU campus with these hands, they mean something. They mean prayer changes things. They mean to me as I drive by it that somebody used their faith to get those hands there. That probably cost a lot of money. Behind us, that campus that you all seen, the Mabee Center, cost millions of dollars. It was Oral Roberts' faith that brought that forth using his faith like a tool—not a weapon, but a tool—a tool that he continually used to build his campus, to build the university for God. And he gave all the glory to God taking healing to the nations, raising up doctors, doing all the things that he did in his generation. But the Lord said, 'Brandon, there's one more wave. There's one more wave of revival. Those old wells that had been capped,' the Lord said, 'I capped them.' He said, 'I'm uncapping those wells.' And as you saw that church, Victory, he said, 'Brandon, there, Victory and ORU will be an extension of each other in the days ahead, and you will see a major outpouring of the spirit of the Lord greater than even Asbury. That was nothing compared to what's about to happen with that Mabee Center. That's nothing compared to what we're about to see all throughout Tulsa with Victory Church. That Victory Church across the street—I don't know how many seats that holds, probably a 10,000-seat auditorium. That's a massive one. And then they have the Mabee Center. And I don't know how many seats that holds. The Mabee Center is a little over 10,000 seats. Okay. So, you have 10,000 seats in the Mabee Center. Thanks, babe. Ten thousand seats in the Mabee Center. We have 5,000 at Victory Church. Okay. So, 15,000 seat capacity between the two. That's amazing. And they could do simulcast, make it live, have an overflow, but it doesn't matter when the glory is there. It's about a radical move of the spirit of God one last time. 'One last call,' he said. And now I see it. Do you remember I told you he was going to use the angels? He told me, he said, 'Brandon, I'm sending my reserves, my angel army reserves. I'm sending them.' There's going to be two angels per person. No matter how many demonic spirits there are on the earth, greater is he that is in you than he that is in the world. I was listening to Sister Billie talk about old stories and John G. Lake would go and he would put a beautiful white suit on with a white tie all fixed up every day because he saw himself as a carrier of the glory. He saw himself as someone who carried God to the nations. There were over 100,000 documented miracles that came through his ministry over the course of the whole time he was preaching. But he got radically on fire going to Azusa Street. There is a cross-pollination with the glory. As you are on fire, you light somebody else on fire. It's not going to be just about the churches, folks. God told me specifically that he was going to do something huge on the OU campus, that there would be a major healing revival come forth with the young people there. So that's why I go and I pray and I drive around it. You go all down Lewis Avenue and I just circle around, just praying in the spirit, seeing the Lord show me something else. I'm hungry. I'm desperate. I want change. I am so tired of having church that's just normal. I know it's like, what are we looking for? What are we waiting for? What is going to be the tipping point to what we're looking for? And the Lord said, "There's no urgency in my churches, for the coming of my son is at hand." Many believe it's way far off in the distant future. But I'm trying to tell you all, just like Paul Revere riding in the midnight hour telling you the British are coming, I'm writing in the midnight hour telling you that Jesus is coming as loud as I can. I've been there. I've seen it. I know exactly what the Lord is saying in my heart. He's shaking me to awaken me every day and have an expectation. I wake up with an urgency every single day to tell you all about the Lord, to tell you all there's a storm coming. I'm here to tell you all there's a heaven to gain and a hell to shun. I'm trying to wake you up to tell you all with urgency, to shake you until your teeth rattle, to tell you, "Listen to me, Jesus is coming." When I went through tribulation with him and he took me out of my body—I don't know if I was in my body or out of my body—I don't know what happened. All I know is I was there, and Jesus told me what was coming before he came. He told me there would be one major push that would not last that long. There would be a major revival that does not last that long, a glorious church that will rise up like Tommy Hicks' vision that he had. You can Google it—Tommy Hicks' vision—and see what I'm talking about, that the body would move like a mighty giant. But the Lord said to me, "Brandon, it's not about charismatics. It's not about the non-denominationalists. I'm going to pour out my spirit upon all flesh." Do you understand? It's going to be a denominational barrier buster. Where it's been, "Well, the Baptists are over here and we don't really listen to them because of their doctrine," and "Well, we don't listen to the Catholics because of their doctrine," and we've got the Methodists and we don't really know what they believe, or what the Church of Christ believe, or whoever. The Lord said, "I'm bringing these denominational walls down." He's going to break the walls down. And he told me, "We will move as a body." Yeah, we all have different thinking, but whenever wartime happened, like in World War II, the men were out to war and the women helped in the factories and did all the things they could to help support the men. Do you understand? In war times, in the body of Christ, we're a body, we're a family. It's not about religious barriers. It's about taking down those walls and knowing that it's all for one and one for all, like the Three Musketeers. We're going to do something big for Jesus. It's about getting the lost saved. We have differences of thinking, but we all have the same cause: to reach the lost for Jesus. Let's join together and reach the lost for Jesus. Regardless of what our beliefs are, you may believe in the baptism of the Holy Spirit, you may not; you may believe in the gifts and signs and wonders, you may not—I don't know. We do. But does that make me better than you? No, it just makes me hungry. I'm hungry and thirsty. We're seeking Him. I know you're hungry and thirsty and seeking Him in your way. But my goodness, folks, what could we do if we joined together? The devil has divided us. The devil has made us think, "Well, you're this and I'm that." No, I believe it's just like racial things—"Well, you're Black, I'm white; you're Mexican, I'm white; you're browner, I'm redder." Whatever. We're all the same blood. We have the same color of blood. My organs would work in your body. Skin shouldn't matter. We're brothers and sisters. It's time to put away our petty differences and rise up and be what God has called us to be: a body. You may be the hand, but I might be the foot. Either way, we work together and we make something beautiful happen. Like the Bible says, even the parts that are not seen are sometimes the most vital. It's just so important because I'm telling you all, I have such a hunger and anticipation. And he told me, "Brandon, I'm going to shake this world like it's never been shaken before. You're about to see things that you never thought you would see. It will be with earthquakes, volcanoes, and signs in the heavens. It's going to shake the ones that are pretending to be awake." He said, "Brandon, for my remnant doesn't even have an urgency, and I am going to bring a great urgency to my body. The ones that are standing in the way will be removed. I will bring up the ones that are hungry, thirsty, and desperate for me, and I will use you mightily in these last days. For the ones that have a religious nose to the sky will either go by the graveside or they're going to be removed. I don't know how, but he told me they will be removed and I will bring forth the new Davids—the ones that will just say yes. God's just looking for a yielded yes. I've said it, and I'll say it again: God's just looking for somebody who says yes. We came across this prophecy. Sister Billie was talking about this at the conference, and Diana, this is from Brother Kenneth E. Hagin. He gave this word back, I don't know how long ago, but it goes alongside what I'm trying to tell you. He even saw what I've tried to tell you all. Tapping into the spirit realm, tapping into the river, will be like taking a breath where it's been so hard to get into it before in the past. It's going to be so easy. We're just going to jump right into those rivers. Holy Ghost flow. Holy Ghost rivers are coming in a mighty rushing wind. The sound of a mighty rushing wind. This was exciting. Diana reads so much better than me, and I said, "Baby, will you read this for me?" Okay, so this is from Kenneth E. Hagin, and it was from 1983. Oh, 1983. Yeah, 1983. It's amazing. I wanted to read this. Hopefully, I can do it justice because it's amazing and very powerful. In this move, you have not seen the revival of divine healing that you're about to see. Praise God, y'all. Oh, yes. You saw those that I raised up. You've seen men and women mightily used of my spirit. I sent them forth as a pilot program to try to train you, but many just looked at them and lifted them up. Some of them were lifted up in pride and the anointing left them. Right? See, deflect. Deflect. That's what the Holy Spirit told us when he visited us: "We're going to work mightily together, but you're always to deflect. Don't let the pride in." Yes, that is it. I didn't hear him say that before. Yes, I'm sorry, I just—my goodness. And some became money-minded and lost the anointing. Money-minded. Pride and money. But there will arise a group in this day that's a brand new breed. They'll not be greedy of filthy lucre. They'll not be wanting to attract attention unto themselves. They would care less whether God uses me; they'd rather God use you. And God will not use just ministers; He'll use laymen. And there'll be a revival of divine healing such as you have not seen in your lifetime or read about or heard about, saith the Lord, and a revival of the supernatural. Not only the supernatural in casting out devils, not only the supernatural in healing the sick, not only the supernatural in speaking with other tongues, but the supernatural in the realm of the seen realm. Men will see the glory of God. A cloud will hang over certain congregations, even the church building, for days at a time. And everybody that passes by, sinner and saint alike, will say, 'Well, what in the world is that? I've never seen anything like that.' And there will be in other places the fire of the spirit. Oh yes, in the spirit realm, some of us have seen it; we've been conscious of the fire of God. But the fire will actually come into manifestation. And there'll be people, sinners as well as saints, that will see fire all over the heads of the people. They'll be driving down the street or down the highway and they'll see fire on top of the buildings and they'll come and say, 'What does all of this mean?' But you see, the Lord will use signs of His presence to bring people in the last days into the fullness of His spirit and into full salvation. And signs, signs—what kinds of signs? Miraculous things in the realm of the spirit. And then they'll be manifested in the realm of the physical. And the glory of God will fall. And the power of God will be in manifestation. And men and women too will even be transported like Philip was and found in another place. And great, great, great shall be the reward thereof. For the Lord God is the same God today as He was yesterday. His power has not diminished, and His name is still the same. Today He can make the iron axe head float. Today He can divide the river just for two men to cross over to the other side. Today He can feed 5,000 with a little boy's lunch. He is the miracle-working God. Brag on Him. Lift Him up. Draw attention unto Him. Tell about how great He is. Get up in faith and tell about what great things He's going to do. And He'll move and keep His word with you. And many shall be astonished. But the greatest miracle of all is that there'll be so many fish caught in the net that the nets can't hold them. The Lord said, 'Get a big net. Brandon, it's time to get a bigger net. You've got to catch them because they're coming in hot.' And I saw them coming in really fast. And I was like a catcher's mitt for a fastball coming in. He said, 'Catch them because they're coming in fast.' Brandon, what's about the shaking that's going to awaken? They're coming in fast. Are you ready? Go. There won't be church houses enough to hold the people. Amen. Amen. For the purpose of all is that you may be fishers of men. Hallelujah. Quit fishing in your bathtub. There's not any fish in your own bathtub. Go out where the fish are and throw out the net—not the hook, the net—and pull it in and bring them in. And the glory of the Lord shall shine and the end shall come. And you'll stand in the place, yes, many of you that stand here, including myself, will stand in the place of ministry that you've not stood in before, and will stand in the place that's been ordained for you from the foundation of the earth. And if it were to be told to you, if we were able to tell you in human language that which will transpire in some of your lives and some of our lives who are here just now, your mind would not be able to comprehend it. As you say, speaking in the human vernacular, it would almost blow your mind. But you'll see it. You'll rejoice in it. You'll be glad of it. It's just out there a little ways in front of you. Be faithful. That was in 1983. So it's not a little ways anymore, folks. No, we're there. I mean, what is that, 41 years ago? Yep. Praise God, folks. It's just out there a little ways in front of you. Be faithful. Be joyous. And rejoice in the Lord always, and He'll bring it to pass. Many shall go and tell the story and His great glory show. The power of God in manifestation shall be the gifts of the spirit. The manifestation of His spirit into full potential shall come the ministry gifts. The apostle and the prophet, the evangelist and pastor and teacher too shall flow as one. One body in the spirit. Hallelujah. Shall go forth to conquer and to do His deeds and great shall be the reward thereof. Thank Him. Glory to God. Now, let me give you further wisdom and advice. Being conscious of a mighty move in your spirit, wanting and desiring to do the will of God, but don't try to do it yourself. Just learn to relax and to flow with the spirit. Don't try to figure it out in your head. What does He want me to do? Just learn to relax and flow with the spirit. It'll take care of itself. You don't have to worry. I know there's something He wants me to do. Fine. Just keep on praying and just flow with the spirit. You'll not come into the full potential of what God has for you tomorrow, next week, or next month. Some will not even come into the full potential of what God has for you next year. But as you're faithful and as you're trained and as you learn to yield, you'll move eventually into that place that He has had for you all along. Glory to God. Moving into that place of ministry, whether it's in full-time ministry or pulpit ministry or personal ministry or whatever your place is in the body of Christ, moving into that place is fueled by prayer, fired by the spirit, and ignited with His glory. I'll read that again: whatever your place is in the body of Christ, moving into that place is fueled by prayer, fired by the spirit, and ignited with His glory. It's the glory. Yes. And it's fueled by prayer. We need more prayer. Even with this channel, it's about the prayer. Because He says, 'If there's no fuel there, there's nothing to ignite.' Fueled by prayer, fired by the spirit, ignited with His glory. You'll have to stop and analyze that. There's a difference between firing and igniting. It's like the furnace. You see, there's a pilot light there that fires the thing, and then the whole thing becomes ignited. Then the heat flows out. Can you see what He's saying? Fueled by prayer, fired by the spirit, ignited with His glory. Hallelujah. If there's no fuel, there's nothing to fire. Fueled by prayer. It's the foundation of everything. It's what brought Azusa Street. It all came out of prayer. They were in that little house on Azusa Street for I don't know how long, praying. Then that earthquake happened in San Francisco and shook that whole thing. They prophesied it, and after the prophecy came, the earthquake came. Everybody remembered the prophecy, and Azusa Street exploded in that little barn, that little stable-looking thing. It all came out of prayer, an awakening unto God. This is part two of this prophetic word, ignited by prayer. This is another prophecy right here, and I feel it's important that we keep going over these prophecies. These are nuggets in archives that we need to bring back out because they were given forty years ago, and people forget about those words. It's time for those words that were spoken forty years ago to manifest. I believe the more we talk about it, it's bringing a charge in the atmosphere. That's why I bring these prophecies back; it brings a charge. You can feel it. I feel that glory stirring up, and I want to run around my house. I can hear Kenneth Hagin's voice saying it. When I'm reading it, you can almost hear his voice. I miss him so much. Pop Hagin was awesome. You are right on the verge of the greatest move and manifestation of the Spirit of God that this world has ever seen. You're right on the edge of it, like standing on the creek bank about to jump in. If you'll give more earnest heed to the things which you have heard—not only those things about faith and healing, but also those things which you have heard about the Holy Spirit, angels, and divine visitation. For remember that it was prophesied by Joel of old: 'In the last days, says the Lord, I will pour out my Spirit upon all flesh; and your young men shall see visions, and your old men shall dream dreams. And upon my handmaidens will I pour out my Spirit, and they will prophesy.' So, not only will young men prophesy, but young women will prophesy. The anointing and the outflow of the Spirit of God shall be great and amazing in these days, for there shall be visitations of angels. Be not afraid. In these days, there shall come a mighty manifestation of the Spirit, and the work that God intended should be done in these last days shall be accomplished. For the time is short and things must be speeded up. You'll learn spiritual things much faster than those of yesteryear, and you'll develop much faster. It'll be said of some that they virtually matured overnight. Glory to God. They shall go forth to speak in the name of the Lord because they understood the principle of faith. They'll understand the principles of the kingdom and the laws of God. They'll operate and minister in that area, and nothing will be hidden from them. Though some standing here now have operated in a measure in those areas in times past, because they've let these things slip, they themselves in ministry and in life have slipped, but they shall be restored. Yea, they shall even be restored this night. The manifestation shall come, and the glory of God shall rest upon you. His glory shall be seen round about, and the cloud of God will come and fill the house. Yea, it will seem as though the whole building is filled with smoke. The glory of God shall be a manifestation, and great shall be the noise thereof. Praise and adoration shall go up from His people, and it shall be noised abroad. Men from afar shall hear of it and shall come to behold it. For the Lord shall be a manifestation in these days in all ways He has ever manifested Himself, both in the Old Covenant and in the New Covenant, plus the multiplying of the power of God. As men grow more and more wicked, and as Satan—because he knows his time is short—and all of his cohorts and evil spirits go about as never before to devour, the power and glory of God shall be increased and multiplied. It shall flow like a mighty river. Millions will be swept into the flow of that river and shall flow forth to be in praise and glory. For the glory of the Lord is in manifestation and will be seen on the faces of the saints. The glory of the Lord God shall shine forth until men walk into a place of business and people will fall on their knees and cry out to God, though nothing be said. Women will walk into a place of business, and people will fall on their knees and cry out to God, though she opens not her mouth. For the manifestation of His power and glory is reserved for this hour. If it could be told in a way that you could see it even with the eyes of your spirit, if it could be displayed at this moment before you in a tangible form that you could see with your physical eye, it would be very difficult for you to believe that which shall shortly come to pass. But as you walk with the Lord and prepare your heart and feed upon His Word, as you listen to what the Spirit of God says, your heart shall be prepared and your mind will be changed until you flow into the supernatural as naturally as a bird flies through the air. It won't take effort; it's just a bird flying through the air gracefully. You'll flow in the supernatural as naturally as a fish swims in the water and as naturally as you breathe the very air. You'll not be conscious of your faith. It will just be like taking a breath. The Lord told me, 'Walking in the supernatural will be like taking a breath. It will be effortless.' Brother Hagin said it too in 1983. I was a baby, but when I heard that, I realized he is saying the same thing forty years later. God doesn't change His mind. He said it to the prophet back then, and He's saying it to the watchman now. It's going to be like taking a breath. It's not going to be so hard where we push; it will be like a light switch. Walking in the supernatural, laying hands on the sick and seeing them recover, casting out devils—we're going to work with the angels for one last push. You'll flow in the supernatural as naturally as you breathe the very air. You'll not be conscious of your faith or what's going on around you, but rather you'll be conscious of the flow of the Spirit of God, and He will manifest Himself and accomplish that which He desires. For you see, these are the last days, and this is the end time. And what is done must be done quickly, and it will be done. And the hearts of many will be caused to rejoice. So rejoice, rejoice, be glad, and praise the Lord, and prepare your hearts, and let Him prepare you for that which He has prepared for you. And so walk in it. You shall walk in it, and you shall run, and you shall fly—literally, spiritually speaking—and you shall enjoy the fullness of what is provided for you. Praise the Lord. Glory to God. That deserves a hallelujah. Raise a hallelujah. Oh Lord, You're so wonderful. Raise a hallelujah. Exciting times to be alive. I'm going to sing in the middle of a storm. Oh God. I just get it. You know, I mean, I can say this and keep talking about it over and over again and just tell you, but the Lord said there's not enough urgency in my body. And this was back 41 years ago. How much more of an urgency should we have? Jesus is standing at the door, ladies and gentlemen. Jesus is standing at the door. He told me, 'I saw Him. His hand was on the doorknob and He was looking up like this.' And I said, 'Lord, what are you doing?' He said, 'I'm waiting on my Father's instructions to come and get you, son. I'm waiting on my Father's instruction to open this door and come back and get you.' The rapture of the church is at hand. We will see a major harvest of souls because He said, 'I—' He held His hands out to me. Remember, there are humongous holes in each of His hands. They were out.
